en: The book of the genealogy of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
zh: 大衛的子孫，亞伯拉罕的後裔，耶穌基督的家譜：

en: Abraham was the father of Isaac, and Isaac the father of Jacob, and Jacob the father of Judah and his brothers,
zh: 亞伯拉罕生以撒，以撒生雅各，雅各生猶大和他的兄弟，

en: and Judah the father of Perez and Zerah by Tamar, and Perez the father of Hezron, and Hezron the father of Ram,
zh: 他瑪給猶大生了法勒斯和謝拉，法勒斯生希斯崙，希斯崙生亞蘭，

en: and Ram the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab the father of Nahshon, and Nahshon the father of Salmon,
zh: 亞蘭生亞米拿達，亞米拿達生拿順，拿順生撒門，

en: and Salmon the father of Boaz by Rahab, and Boaz the father of Obed by Ruth, and Obed the father of Jesse,
zh: 喇合給撒門生了波阿斯，路得給波阿斯生了俄備得，俄備得生耶西，

en: and Jesse the father of David the king. And David was the father of Solomon by the wife of Uriah,
zh: 耶西生大衛王。 烏利亞的妻子給大衛生了所羅門，

en: and Solomon the father of Rehoboam, and Rehoboam the father of Abijah, and Abijah the father of Asaph,
zh: 所羅門生羅波安，羅波安生亞比雅，亞比雅生亞撒，

en: and Asaph the father of Jehoshaphat, and Jehoshaphat the father of Joram, and Joram the father of Uzziah,
zh: 亞撒生約沙法，約沙法生約蘭，約蘭生烏西雅，

en: and Uzziah the father of Jotham, and Jotham the father of Ahaz, and Ahaz the father of Hezekiah,
zh: 烏西雅生約坦，約坦生亞哈斯，亞哈斯生希西家，

en: and Hezekiah the father of Manasseh, and Manasseh the father of Amos, and Amos the father of Josiah,
zh: 希西家生瑪拿西，瑪拿西生亞們，亞們生約西亞，

en: and Josiah the father of Jechoniah and his brothers, at the time of the deportation to Babylon.
zh: 猶太人被擄到巴比倫的時候，約西亞生耶哥尼雅和他的兄弟。

en: And after the deportation to Babylon: Jechoniah was the father of Shealtiel, and Shealtiel the father of Zerubbabel,
zh: 被擄到巴比倫以後，耶哥尼雅生撒拉鐵，撒拉鐵生所羅巴伯，

en: and Zerubbabel the father of Abiud, and Abiud the father of Eliakim, and Eliakim the father of Azor,
zh: 所羅巴伯生亞比玉，亞比玉生以利亞敬，以利亞敬生亞所，

en: and Azor the father of Zadok, and Zadok the father of Achim, and Achim the father of Eliud,
zh: 亞所生撒督，撒督生亞金，亞金生以律，

en: and Eliud the father of Eleazar, and Eleazar the father of Matthan, and Matthan the father of Jacob,
zh: 以律生以利亞撒，以利亞撒生馬但，馬但生雅各，

en: and Jacob the father of Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom Jesus was born, who is called Christ.
zh: 雅各生約瑟，就是馬利亞的丈夫；那稱為基督的耶穌，是馬利亞所生的。

en: So all the generations from Abraham to David were fourteen generations, and from David to the deportation to Babylon fourteen generations, and from the deportation to Babylon to the Christ fourteen generations.
zh: 這樣，從亞伯拉罕到大衛，一共是十四代；從大衛到被擄到巴比倫的時候，也是十四代；從被擄到巴比倫的時候到基督，又是十四代。

en: Now the birth of Jesus Christ took place in this way. When his mother Mary had been betrothed to Joseph, before they came together she was found to be with child from the Holy Spirit.
zh: 耶穌基督的降生是這樣的：耶穌的母親馬利亞許配了約瑟，他們還沒有成親，馬利亞就從聖靈懷了孕。

en: And her husband Joseph, being a just man and unwilling to put her to shame, resolved to divorce her quietly.
zh: 她丈夫約瑟是個義人，不願張揚使她受辱，就打算暗中與她解除婚約。

en: But as he considered these things, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream, saying, "Joseph, son of David, do not fear to take Mary as your wife, for that which is conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit.
zh: 他一直想著這些事，主的使者就在夢中向他顯現，說：“大衛的子孫約瑟，只管放膽把你的妻子馬利亞迎娶過來，因為她懷的孕是從聖靈來的。

en: She will bear a son, and you shall call his name Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
zh: 她必生一個兒子，你要給他起名叫耶穌，因為他要把自己的子民從罪惡中拯救出來。”

en: All this took place to fulfill what the Lord had spoken by the prophet:
zh: 這整件事的發生，是要應驗主藉著先知所說的：

en: "Behold, the virgin shall conceive and bear a son, and they shall call his name Immanuel" (which means, God with us).
zh: “必有童女懷孕生子， 他的名要叫以馬內利。” 以馬內利就是“ 神與我們同在”的意思。

en: When Joseph woke from sleep, he did as the angel of the Lord commanded him: he took his wife,
zh: 約瑟睡醒了，就照著主的使者所吩咐的，把妻子迎娶過來；

en: but knew her not until she had given birth to a son. And he called his name Jesus.
zh: 只是在孩子出生以前，並沒有與她同房。約瑟給孩子起名叫耶穌。
